use_cases: Creating interactive portfolio showcases where images reveal their full color on hover
Building engaging hero sections with animated wave effects and spotlight reveals
Adding immersive product displays with flashlight-style color revelation
Designing creative landing pages with dithered image effects and ripple interactions
Enhancing visual storytelling with ambient wave animations and mouse-driven reveals
ai_summary: An interactive Three.js image component featuring B&W dithering with animated continuous waves and mouse-controlled flashlight reveal that shows original color. The component includes smooth fading transitions, water ripple effects on mouse movement, and uses responsive CSS object-fit styling. Ideal for creative portfolios, hero sections, and any media display requiring engaging image interactions.
